categories.h(3) Library Functions Manual categories.h(3)

NAME

categories.h - Extern declarations for all category entry arrays.

SYNOPSIS

Variables


const registry_entry_t g_general_entries []
const registry_entry_t g_logging_entries []
const registry_entry_t g_terminal_entries []
const registry_entry_t g_configuration_entries []
const registry_entry_t g_display_entries []
const registry_entry_t g_webcam_entries []

const registry_entry_t g_network_entries []
const registry_entry_t g_security_entries []
const registry_entry_t g_database_entries []
const registry_entry_t g_debug_entries []

Detailed Description

Extern declarations for all category entry arrays.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

175      "%file - full file path; %file_relative - file path relative to project root; %line - line number; "

Author


Zachary Fogg <me@zfo.gg>







  

    Version 0.11.2
    ascii-chat
